name: Little Brother (piero monti)
description:
READ THE FUCKING DESCRIPTION FIRST There is everything you need to know!!!

This is another few ports from character

From @thegrandduck

I kinda like his bots and am kinda sad i don't see any here (i think)

If the man himself wants me to take it down please ask in the Comments

Also i do not know if this is an OC or not, i believe it is but i am too lazy to search

Second is a copy of the first with a few sentences removed for more freedom

The third one is a pre update that i managed to get an actual year ago i didn't touch a single thing about that one so it could be incompatible with tags or whatnot

I just copied and pasted the this text from my last one and im a sucker for engagement but seemingly people do not like my original shit

Ive copyed the first scene with some sentences removed for more freedom
